---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 0.5cm
      y: 0.5cm
    columns: 3
    keep-typ: false
    template-partials:
      - typst-template.typ
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=typst}
#set text(font: "Arial", size: 8pt)
#set par(leading: 0.5em)
#show heading.where(level: 2): set text(size: 10pt, weight: "bold")
#show raw: set text(font: "Courier New", size: 7.5pt)

// Full-width header — spans all columns
#place(
  top + left,
  float: true,
  scope: "parent",
  clearance: 0.5cm,
  block(
    width: 100%,
    fill: rgb("#0080ff"),
    radius: 4pt,
    inset: 8pt,
    [
      #grid(
        columns: (1fr, auto),
        gutter: 8pt,
        [
          #text(size: 20pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)[mnirs]
          #h(0.6em)
          #text(size: 10pt, fill: white.transparentize(30%))[v0.4.2.2]
          #linebreak()
          #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)[
            Muscle Near-Infrared Spectroscopy Processing and Analysis
          ]
          #linebreak()
          #v(0.2em)
          #text(size: 8pt, fill: white.transparentize(20%))[
            Read, process, and analyse data from muscle near-infrared spectroscopy (mNIRS) devices. Import raw data from .csv or .xls(x) files and return a time-series data frame with metadata. Includes standardised methods for cleaning, filtering, and pre-processing mNIRS data for subsequent custom analysis, with a custom plot theme and colour palette.
          ]
        ],
        [
          #image("mnirs-hex.svg", height: 1.6cm)
        ]
      )
    ]
  )
)

// Workflow pipeline — spans all columns
#place(
  top + left,
  float: true,
  scope: "parent",
  clearance: 0.3cm,
  block(
    width: 100%,
    stroke: rgb("#cccccc"),
    radius: 4pt,
    inset: (x: 10pt, y: 6pt),
    [
      #text(size: 8.5pt, weight: "bold")[Workflow] #h(0.8em)
      #text(font: "Courier New", size: 8pt)[
        read_mnirs() #sym.arrow.r resample_mnirs() #sym.arrow.r replace_mnirs() #sym.arrow.r filter_mnirs() #sym.arrow.r shift_mnirs() / rescale_mnirs() #sym.arrow.r extract_intervals() #sym.arrow.r plot()
      ]
    ]
  )
)
```

## Read

**`read_mnirs()`** — Import mnirs data from .csv or .xls(x)

**`example_mnirs()`** — Paths to a included example file

```r
read_mnirs()

example_mnirs()
```

---

## Resample

**`resample_mnirs()`** — Resample to a regular time grid

```r
resample_mnirs()
```

---

## Clean

**`replace_mnirs()`** — Replace outliers, invalid values, and missing data

```r
replace_mnirs()
```

#### Vector-level functions

**`replace_outliers()`** — Replace local outliers

**`replace_invalid()`** — Replace specified invalid values

**`replace_missing()`** — Interpolate over `NA` values

```r
replace_outliers()
replace_invalid()
replace_missing()
```

---

```{=typst}
#colbreak()
```

## Filter

**`filter_mnirs()`** — Apply digital filter/smoothing to mNIRS channels

```r
filter_mnirs()
```

#### Vector-level functions

**`filter_butter()`** — Apply a Butterworth digital filter

**`filter_ma()`** — Apply centred moving average smoothing

```r
filter_butter()
filter_ma()
```

---

## Transform

**`shift_mnirs()`** — Shift channels to a reference value

```r
shift_mnirs()
```

**`rescale_mnirs()`** — Rescale channels data range

```r
rescale_mnirs()
```

**`extract_intervals()`** — Extract interval data frames around events

```r
extract_intervals()
```

---

```{=typst}
#colbreak()
```

## Plot

**`plot()`** — Plot a data frame of class `"mnirs"`

```r
plot()
```

**`theme_mnirs()`** — ggplot2 theme for mnirs plots

```r
theme_mnirs()
```

**`palette_mnirs()`** — Access the mnirs colour palette

```r
palette_mnirs()
```

**`scale_colour_mnirs()`** — Colour scale with mnirs palette 

**`scale_fill_mnirs()`** — Fill scale with mnirs palette
    

```r
scale_colour_mnirs()
scale_fill_mnirs()
```

**`format_hmmss()`** — Plot axis in time units

**`breaks_timespan()`** — Plot axis with time breaks

```r
scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = breaks_timespan(),
    labels = format_hmmss
)
```

```{=typst}
// Footer
#place(
  bottom + left,
  scope: "parent",
  float: true,
  block(
    width: 100%,
    [
      #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#cccccc"))
      #v(0.2em)
      #text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#888888"))[
        {mnirs} website: #link("https://jemarnold.github.io/mnirs/")[jemarnold.github.io/mnirs]
        #h(1fr)
        {mnirs} github: #link("https://github.com/jemarnold/mnirs")[github.com/jemarnold/mnirs]
      ]
    ]
  )
)
```
